# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "servicePrincipalName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Display name for the Azure AD application/service principal."
      }
    },
    "subscriptionId": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Target subscription ID where the role assignment will be created."
      }
    },
    "principalId": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Object ID of the service principal to assign the role to."
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "contributorRoleDefinitionId": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c')]",
    "roleAssignmentName": "[guid(parameters('subscriptionId'), parameters('principalId'), variables('contributorRoleDefinitionId'))]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2022-04-01",
      "name": "[variables('roleAssignmentName')]",
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[variables('contributorRoleDefinitionId')]",
        "principalId": "[parameters('principalId')]",
        "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
      }
    }
  ]
}
